title: SourceServer
description: A source server registered with the Application Migration Service

sourceServerID.description: Unique identifier for the source server

isArchived.description: Whether the source server is archived

tags.description: Tags applied to the source server

applicationID.description: ID of the application this server belongs to

vcenterClientID.description: ID of the vCenter client this server was discovered from

replicationType.description: Replication type for the source server

userProvidedID.description: User-provided identifier for the source server

fqdnForActionFramework.description: FQDN used for action framework connectivity
